hero.description:
Purpose, strategy, and presence
across all touchpoints.

cta.description: Fill out the form so we can better understand your project's objectives and schedule a strategic conversation.

hero.title: About
hero.description_main: At Palaz, we believe that a strong brand goes far beyond good design. It is born from strategy, vision, and purpose.
hero.description: We are a strategic design studio focused on transforming companies into solid and memorable brands. We work side by side with entrepreneurs and businesses that want more than aesthetics — they want positioning, identity, and clear direction.

manifesto.subtitle: OUR MANIFESTO
manifesto.title: We combine strategic thinking and visual creativity to build brands that connect, stand out, and grow consistently.
manifesto.text1: If you are looking for brand presence, clarity in positioning, and an identity that truly represents your business value, Palaz is your place.

step1.title: Immersion & Diagnosis
step1.description: Before creating anything, we listen. Immersion is the starting point of all our projects. At this stage, we dive into the client's history, challenges, and goals. We investigate the market, analyze competitors, understand the audience, and identify opportunities. This phase allows us to build a solid foundation with clarity about what the brand needs to communicate and why it exists.

step2.title: Strategic Positioning
step2.description: With the right information in hand, we begin building the brand's conceptual foundation. This is when we define its purpose, values, personality, and tone of voice. We also identify the differentiators that make the brand unique and map the territory it should occupy in the market. Positioning is the strategic heart of identity: it drives all creative and communication decisions from here on.

step3.title: Visual Identity Creation
step3.description: Now, strategy takes shape. With positioning well defined, we begin the visual identity creation process. We develop the logo, color palette, typography, graphic elements, and the visual system as a whole. More than aesthetics, we seek coherence, functionality, and expression. Every visual choice carries an intention. We create brands with personality — brands that stand out and endure over time.

step4.title: Delivery & Direction
step4.description: With the identity ready, it's time to set everything in motion. We organize the final files, deliver ready-to-use materials, and guide the client on how to apply their new brand consistently. If needed, we also create an application guide that ensures autonomy and clarity in using the visual system. Our goal is for the brand to exist with strength — from presentations to social media, from packaging to the website. And to remain true to the purpose for which it was created.

hero.title: Our Work.
hero.description_main: Brands conceived with strategy, created with intention, and built to go beyond the visual.
hero.description: Each case shows a glimpse of our process, our mindset, and how we help businesses position themselves with strength and clarity.

aira-essence.title: Aira Essence
aira-essence.description:
Aira Essence is a brand dedicated to providing well-being through carefully developed products with natural ingredients and captivating aromas. Inspired by the connection with nature, Aira seeks to transform small moments into unique sensory experiences, bringing lightness and balance to everyday life.

With a complete line that includes body moisturizers, bar soaps, and aromatherapy sprays, Aira values ​​simplicity, comfort, and sophistication. Each product is designed to create an atmosphere of care and tranquility, combining quality and authenticity.
aira-essence.keywords: natural cosmetics, cosmetics visual identity, personal care branding, packaging design, brand naming, natural essences, aromatherapy, body moisturizer, artisan soap, wellness brand, cosmetics logo, brand color palette, minimalist design, strategic branding, premium packaging, natural products, beauty brand, premium visual identity

sland-inteligencia-produtiva.title: Sland Productive Intelligence
sland-inteligencia-produtiva.description:
The visual identity of SLAND, a technology company applied to agribusiness, was developed to clearly and sophisticatedly communicate the brand's central pillars: innovation, sustainability, and efficiency in the field. The color palette balances natural and technological elements, combining forest green and digital lime green, which evoke the vitality of the land and a commitment to sustainability, with deep blue and light cyan blue, which represent data intelligence, connectivity, and trust in monitoring systems.

For the logo's construction, the Nasalization font was used, a futuristic typeface with rounded shapes that reinforce the brand's technological positioning in a striking and contemporary way. The institutional and supporting typeface is TT Interphases Pro Trl, which combines geometry and fluidity, ensuring high legibility and a modern, accessible look for the brand's digital and print applications.
sland-inteligencia-produtiva.keywords: Technological agribusiness, agribusiness branding, agtech visual identity, strategic agricultural design, productive intelligence, innovation in the field, rural sustainability, agricultural automation, smart land, agricultural brand positioning, strategic agricultural consulting, agribusiness brand management, Brazilian agricultural technology, branding for agricultural startups, agribusiness logo design

acougue-almeida.title: Almeida Butcher Shop
acougue-almeida.description: Almeida Butcher Shop sought a visual identity that conveyed tradition, trust, and quality, but in a modern and striking way. The challenge was to balance the strength and rusticity of the segment with an accessible and professional aesthetic. As a solution, we developed a symbol inspired by the figure of the ox, representing robustness and movement, combined with a solid and impactful typography. The color palette reinforces tradition, trust, and approachability, creating a memorable and versatile brand.
acougue-almeida.keywords: Premium butcher shop, butcher shop visual identity, food retail branding, butcher shop logo design, tradition and quality, prime cuts of meat, brand positioning, strategic design, rustic visual identity, beef logo, meat shop, branding for butcher shops, food marketing, meat packaging design, trusted brand, luxury retail, traditional color palette

fatuz.title: Fatuz
fatuz.description:
For many freelancers and self-employed individuals, informal invoices via Word or WhatsApp convey amateurism and delay payments. Fatuz solves this problem by acting as a bridge to premium positioning: an agile platform that combines invoicing with Pix (Brazil's instant payment system) and financial management in an elegant interface, elevating the professional's credibility from digital to PDF.

The project carries the DNA of its founder in its naming, merging the essence of the business (Invoice) with Palaz's strategic signature through the suffix "Z," validating the platform's robustness. This identity is materialized in a monogram "F" that symbolizes continuous financial flow and a sans-serif typeface that conveys security. Complementing the ecosystem, the color palette combines the authority of Dark Mode with the high contrast of white and the energy of Neo Green, stimulating technical focus and the perception of constant profit.
fatuz.role: Branding / Visual Identity / Naming / UI/UX Design / Web Design
fatuz.keywords: Financial SaaS, Freelancer, Invoice Generator, Billing Management, Service Provider, Automatic Pix (Brazilian instant payment system), Product Design, Freelancers, Quick Quotes, FinTech UI, Digital Nomad, Financial Dashboard, Personal Branding, Home Office, Profit Reports, branding, logo, app, brand, logotype, website

ncglass-vidracaria.title: NcGlass Glassworks
ncglass-vidracaria.description: NcGlass sought a visual identity that conveyed sophistication, safety, and high technical precision with a modern and refined approach. The major challenge was balancing the robustness required in the architectural glass installation segment with an elegant and minimalist aesthetic. As a solution, we developed a symbol inspired by glass panes in perspective, simultaneously translating solidity and transparency, combined with contemporary typography. The color palette reinforces confidence and modernity, resulting in a memorable brand for the architecture and design sector.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.section1_content: We collect information that you provide directly to us through our contact form, such as your name, email, and project details. Additionally, we collect anonymous browsing data (such as IP address and browser type) through Google Analytics to improve your experience on our website.
PrivacyPolicy.section2_content: Your data is used exclusively for the purposes for which it was collected: responding to quote requests, providing contracted services, and, if authorized, sending communications about our projects and news. We do not sell your data to third parties under any circumstances.
PrivacyPolicy.section3_content: We use essential cookies for the website's operation and third-party cookies (Google Analytics) for traffic analysis. You can configure your browser to refuse all cookies, although some website features may be affected.
PrivacyPolicy.section4_content: We implement technical and administrative measures to protect your data against unauthorized access or loss. All communication between your browser and our server is encrypted via HTTPS (SSL) protocol.
PrivacyPolicy.section5_content: You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time. You can also revoke your consent for data processing, as provided by data protection laws.
PrivacyPolicy.section6_content: We keep your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law for tax and legal obligations.
PrivacyPolicy.contact_info: To exercise your rights or if you have questions about this policy, contact us at: estudiopalaz@gmail.com
